titleStmt.title: The Collected Letters of Robert Southey. Part Five: 1816-1818
A Romantic Circles Electronic Edition

publicationStmt.publisher: Romantic Circles, http://www.rc.umd.edu, University of Maryland

availability.p: Material from the Romantic Circles Website may not be downloaded, reproduced or disseminated in any manner without authorization unless it is for purposes of criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, and/or classroom use as provided by the Copyright Act of 1976, as amended.

Unless otherwise noted, all Pages and Resources mounted on Romantic Circles are copyrighted by the author/editor and may be shared only in accordance with the Fair Use provisions of U.S. copyright law. Except as expressly permitted by this statement, redistribution or republication in any medium requires express prior written consent from the author/editors and advance notification of Romantic Circles. Any requests for authorization should be forwarded to Romantic Circles:> Romantic Circles c/o Professor Neil Fraistat Department of English University of Maryland College Park, MD 20742 fraistat@umd.edu

By their use of these texts and images, users agree to the following conditions:
These texts and images may not be used for any commercial purpose without prior written permission from Romantic Circles.
These texts and images may not be re-distributed in any forms other than their current ones.

Users are not permitted to download these texts and images in order to mount them on their own servers. It is not in our interest or that of our users to have uncontrolled subsets of our holdings available elsewhere on the Internet. We make corrections and additions to our edited resources on a continual basis, and we want the most current text to be the only one generally available to all Internet users. Institutions can, of course, make a link to the copies at Romantic Circles, subject to our conditions of use.

monogr.title: The Collected Letters of Robert Southey, Part Five
Electronic Editions

imprint.publisher: Romantic Circles, http://www.rc.umd.edu, University of Maryland

sourceDesc.p: These letters were edited with the assistance of Tim Fulford, Ian Packer and Lynda Pratt

quotation.p: All quotation marks and apostrophes have been changed: " for “," for ”, ' for ‘, and ' for ’.

hyphenation.p: Any dashes occurring in line breaks have been removed.
Because of web browser variability, all hyphens have been typed on the U.S. keyboard.
Dashes have been rendered as a variable number of hyphens to give a more exact rendering of their length.

normalization.p: Southey's spelling has not been regularized.
Writing in other hands appearing on these manuscripts has been indicated as such, the content recorded in brackets.
& has been used for the ampersand sign.
£ has been used for £, the pound sign
All other characters, those with accents, non-breaking spaces, etc., have been encoded in HTML entity decimals.

taxonomy.bibl: NINES categories for Genre and Material Form at http://www.performantsoftware.com/nines_wiki/index.php/Submitting_RDF#.3Cnines:genre.3E on 2009-02-26

list.item: Ran transforms for proofing Southey Part 5

Letter 2748.30 March 1816: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2753.Easter Sunday [14] April 1816: Henry Herbert Southey
Letter 2755.Easter Tuesday [16 April] 1816: Grosvenor Charles Bedford
Letter 2760.17 April [1816]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2791.17 May 1816: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2805.4 June 1816: [Princess Charlotte Augusta of Wales]
Letter 2819.2 July 1816: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2841.11 September 1816: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2843.[begun before and continued on 15 September 1816]: Grosvenor Charles Bedford
Letter 2846.17 September [1816]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2851.11 October 1816: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2875.[started before and continued on] 8 December [1816]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2907.27 January [1817]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2918.14 February 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2920.15 February 1817: Messrs Longman and Co.
Letter 2927.23 February 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2935.7 March 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2944.17 March [1817]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2946.[19 March 1817]: the Editor of the Courier
Letter 2948.19 March 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2951.22 March 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2953.[begun before and concluded on] 23 March 1817: [William Wilberforce]
Letter 2957.26 March 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2969.Easter Sunday [6 April] 1817: Henry Herbert Southey
Letter 2970.Easter Sunday [6 April 1817]: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2976. 13 April 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 2987.[begun before and continued on] 5–8 May [1817]: William Wordsworth
Letter 2990. 8 May 1817: [John Baker Holroyd, 1st Earl of Sheffield]
Letter 3015. 23 August 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3025. 30 September 1817: [John Baker Holroyd, 1st Earl of Sheffield]
Letter 3040. 20 November 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3046. 2 December 1817: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3061. 1 January 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3088. 8 March 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3092. 15 March 1818: Alexander Robert Charles Dallas
Letter 3100. 21 March 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3101. Easter Eve [22 March] 1818: Thomas Southey
Letter 3145. 2 June 1818: Henry J. Monck Mason
Letter 3148. 7 June 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3178. 4 August 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3204. 4 November 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3223. 22 December 1818: Charles Watkin Williams Wynn
Letter 3226. [late December 1818]: Robert Southey and [Sara Coleridge] to [Derwent Coleridge]
